---
title: "HADACA3 Framework Benchamrk between Snakemake and Nextflow"
subtitle: "Meta analysis"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE, comment = "#>", fig.width=12, fig.height=12, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results="verbatim", dpi=75)
```

```{r loading_pckgs}
# Load necessary library
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr) 
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
```


# display number of jobs for each setup

```{r setup_data}

data <- data.frame(
  job = rep(c(
    "cleaning_mix", "cleaning_ref", "features_selection", "late_integration",
    "metaanalysis", "prediction_deconvolution_met", "prediction_deconvolution_rna",
    "preprocessing", "scoring"
  ), times = 10),
  # setup = rep(paste0("setup", 1:10), each = 9),
  setup = rep(paste0(1:10), each = 9),
  count = c(
    # setup1
    1, 1, 5, 4, 1, 2, 2, 5, 4,
    # setup2
    2, 1, 7, 8, 1, 4, 4, 7, 8,
    # setup3
    4, 1, 11, 16, 1, 8, 8, 11, 16,
    # setup4
    2, 1, 16, 128, 1, 64, 4, 10, 128,
    # setup5
    2, 1, 16, 384, 1, 64, 4, 10, 384,
    # setup6
    2, 1, 16, 512, 1, 64, 4, 10, 512,
    # setup7
    2, 1, 26, 4608, 1, 96, 96, 13, 4608,
    # setup8
    2, 1, 33, 10368, 1, 216, 96, 13, 10368,
    # setup9
    2, 1, 33, 31104, 1, 216, 96, 13, 31104,
    # setup10
    2, 1, 33, 62208, 1, 216, 96, 13, 62208
  )
)
# data$setup <- factor(data$setup, levels = paste0("setup", 1:10))
data$setup <- factor(data$setup, levels =  1:10)


totals_setup <- data %>%
  group_by(setup) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(count), .groups = "drop")

```

## With linear scale. 

```{r linear_setup_number}
ggplot(data, aes(x = setup, y = count, fill = job)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Job Counts by Setup",
       x = "Setup", y = "Total Count") +
  # scale_y_log10() + 
  geom_text(
    data = totals_setup,
    aes(x = setup, y = total, label = total),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,         
    vjust = -0.25,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```


## With log scale

```{r,eval = FALSE}
ggplot(data, aes(x = setup, y = count, fill = job)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Job Counts by Setup",
       x = "Setup", y = "Total Count") +
  scale_y_log10() + 
  geom_text(
    data = totals_setup,
    aes(x = setup, y = total, label = total),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,         
    vjust = -0.25,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## log scale v2

```{r}
library(tidytext) 
data2 <- data %>%
  group_by(setup) %>%
  mutate(job_ordered = reorder_within(job, count, setup)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(data2, aes(x = job_ordered, y = count, fill = job)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_log10(labels = comma) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Paired", name = "Job type") +
  facet_wrap(~ setup, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_reordered() +      # <–– *** this fixes the issue ***
  labs(
    title = "Job Counts by Setup",
    # subtitle = "Each setup shows jobs ordered by their count",
    x = "Setup",
    y = "Count (log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
        # Remove job labels
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),

    # Zoom axis labels
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    # axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),

    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 24),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
  # Save the last plot
ggsave(
  filename = "job_counts_by_setup.pdf",  # file name
  plot = last_plot(),                    # current plot
  device = "pdf",                        # file type
  width = 14,                            # width in inches
  height = 6,                            # height in inches
  units = "in"                           # units for width/height
)

```



#  Analyse the results
##  Parse result 

```{r parse_results}
# file_path <- paste0("results/data1-9.txt")  # Replace with the actual file path
file_path <- paste0("results/data.txt")  # Replace with the actual file path
data <- readLines(file_path)
filtered_data <- data[grepl("^\\w+\\s*:\\s*\\([0-9.]+,[0-9.]+\\)$", data)]

# Parse the data
parsed_data <- data.frame(
  line = filtered_data,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    workflow = sub(" .*", "", line),
    values = sub(".* : \\(", "", line),
      values = sub("\\)", "", values),
    time = as.numeric(sub(",.*", "", values)),
    memory = as.numeric(sub(".*?,", "", values)),
    setup = as.numeric(sub("\\D+", "", workflow)),
    workflow= sub("\\d+","",workflow)
  ) %>%
  select(setup, workflow, time, memory)


```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

data2 <- data %>%
  group_by(job) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(count), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(total) %>%
  mutate(job = factor(job, levels = job)) %>%
  right_join(data, by = "job")

ggplot(data2, aes(x = job, y = count, fill = job)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_log10(labels = comma) +      # <-- only one function with log scale
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Paired", name = "Job type") +
  facet_wrap(~ setup, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "Job Counts by Setup",
    x = "Job type",
    y = "Count (log scale)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),      # hide job labels
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 24),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

## plot Time 


```{r prepare_data}

sec_to_hms_pretty <- function(sec, sep = " ") {
  vapply(sec, function(s) {
    p  <- seconds_to_period(s)
    dd <- day(p)
    hh <- hour(p)
    mm <- minute(p)
    ss <- round(second(p))

    parts <- c(
      if(dd>0) sprintf("%d%sd ", dd, sep) else NULL,
      if (hh > 0 || dd > 0 ) sprintf("%d%sh ", hh, sep) else NULL,
      if (dd == 0 && (mm > 0 || hh > 0)) sprintf("%d%sm ", mm, sep) else NULL,
      if (dd>0 || hh >0) NULL else sprintf("%d%ss", ss, sep)
    )
    sub(paste0(sep, "$"), "", paste0(parts, collapse = ""))
  }, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}


axis_labs <- totals_setup %>%       
  mutate(label = paste0(setup, " (", total, ")")) %>%
  mutate(setup = as.integer(setup))

plot_df <- parsed_data %>%
  mutate(setup = as.integer(setup)) %>%
  left_join(axis_labs, by = "setup") %>%
  mutate(time_hms = sec_to_hms_pretty(time))%>%
   mutate(memory_lbl = comma(round(memory, 0))) 

# remove snakeme_dry_dep
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  filter(workflow != "snakemake_dep_dry")
```


```{r plot_time}
ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x = factor(label, levels = axis_labs$label),
           y = time,
           colour = workflow,
           group  = workflow)) +
  geom_line(size = 2) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = time_hms),
                  nudge_y  = 0.1,     
                  nudge_x = - 0.1   , 
                  min.segment.length = 0,  
                  size = 3,
                  box.padding = 0.4,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(title   = "Execution Time by Workflow and Setup",
       x       = "Setup (total jobs)",
       y       = "Time (seconds, log scale)",
       colour  = "Workflow") +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(

    # Zoom axis labels
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),

    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 24),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
  # ggsave(
  # filename = "jobs_time.pdf",  # file name
  # plot = last_plot(),                    # current plot
  # device = "pdf",                        # file type
  # width = 14,                            # width in inches
  # height = 6,                            # height in inches
  # units = "in"                           # units for width/height
  # )
```

## plot time V2
```{r}

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x = factor(label, levels = axis_labs$label),
           y = time,
           colour = workflow,
           group  = workflow)) +

  # Lines and points
  geom_line(size = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +

  # Labels
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = time_hms),
                  nudge_y  = 0.05,     
                  nudge_x = 0, 
                  min.segment.length = 0,  
                  size = 3.5,
                  box.padding = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) +

  # Log scale with nice breaks
  scale_y_log10(labels = comma,
                breaks = scales::trans_breaks("log10", function(x) 10^x),
                minor_breaks = NULL,
                expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.15))) +

  # Color palette
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Dark2", name = "Workflow") +

  # Labels
  labs(title   = "Execution Time by Workflow and Setup",
       x       = "Setup (total jobs)",
       y       = "Time (seconds, log scale)") +

  # Theme
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 22),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90")
  )
    ggsave(
  filename = "jobs_time.pdf",  # file name
  plot = last_plot(),                    # current plot
  device = "pdf",                        # file type
  width = 20,                            # width in inches
  height = 10,                            # height in inches
  units = "in"                           # units for width/height
  )
```

## plot memory usage

```{r plot_memory}
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = factor(label, levels = axis_labs$label), y = memory, group = workflow, color = workflow)) +
  geom_line(size = 2) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = memory_lbl),
        nudge_y  = 100,     
        nudge_x = - 0.4   , 
        min.segment.length = 0,  
        size = 3,
        box.padding = 0.4,
        max.overlaps = Inf) +
  labs(title = "Memory used by Workflow and Setup", x = "Setup (total jobs)", y = "Memory (Mo)") +
  theme_minimal()


```






# Submissions  Graph and comits. 
## data 
```{r}

submissions <- data.frame(
  category = c("Phase 1 submissions", "Phase 2 submissions", "Total submissions \n(including failed submissions):"),
  count    = c(109, 518, 847)
)

commits <- data.frame(
  repository = c("Private repo commits", "Public repo commits","Hadaca3 Framework repo commits"),
  count      = c(800, 200, 400)
)


```

## plot submissions
```{r}

p1 <- ggplot(submissions, aes(x = category, y = count, fill = category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(count)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Submissions by Phase",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of submissions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),

    # axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    # plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 22),
    # plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 16),
    # legend.position = "right",
    # legend.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    # legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    # panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90")
    
    # )
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold")
  )


  ggsave(
  filename = "Submission_per_phase.pdf",  # file name
  plot = last_plot(),                    # current plot
  device = "pdf",                        # file type
  width = 10,                            # width in inches
  height = 5,                            # height in inches
  units = "in"                           # units for width/height
  )
p1
```
## plot commits
```{r}

p2 <- ggplot(commits, aes(x = repository, y = count, fill = repository)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(count)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Paired") +
  labs(
    title = "Repository Commit Counts",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of commits"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 24, face = "bold")
  )
  ggsave(
  filename = "commit_per_repo_hadaca3_framework.pdf",  # file name
  plot = last_plot(),                    # current plot
  device = "pdf",                        # file type
  width = 10,                            # width in inches
  height = 5,                            # height in inches
  units = "in"                           # units for width/height
  )
p2
```
